title: Ball Transition
result_description: A bounced ping-pong ball lands in a hot pan and appears to turn into a cracked egg, blended with a circular mask on the cut.

inputs.name: ball_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off shot: bounce the ping-pong ball so it lands and stops in the pan (catch it on a soft cloth so it doesn't bounce out).

capture_requirements.framing: pan handle turned out of frame

inputs.name: egg_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Without moving the camera, crack an egg into the hot pan at the same center spot; keep arms and shadows clear of the pan for a clean blend.

capture_requirements.note: egg lands in the same spot the ball landed; no shadows over the pan

params.note: trim each clip to the needed section; keep extra head on the egg clip to cover the ball clip
drop the egg clip onto an overlay track over the ball clip

edit_steps.note: halve opacity to align the ball-bounce hit with the egg hit

params.note: slip the egg clip so it lands the exact frame the ball lands
size the circle to cover the pan/cloth
add feather to soften the circle edge for believability

result.description: The ball lands and seamlessly becomes the cracked egg sizzling in the pan.
success_criteria: Ball and egg hit on the same frame
Circle mask hides the cut, no hard edge
Pan stays static with no exposure shift
